steps.title: Identify what accomplishes the goal
steps.content: The goal is explicit: identify the title of Zora Neale Hurston's first published short story. Any effective answer must directly name it.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content: B directly accomplishes this by naming the title: “John Redding Goes to Sea.” Choices A, C, and D provide related information—the year, the publication venue, or the genre—but none states the actual title needed to accomplish the goal. That matches choice B — B is correct.
